江辰来到一个人类与御兽共存的世界，从爷爷那继承了一座饲育基地。
在基地快要倒闭之时，【御兽图鉴】觉醒，只要收录御兽就能获得对应的进化路线。
至此青山饲育基地正式起航。
火雀——炽火鹰——蛮荒万焱雕。
翻江鳄——覆海鳄龙——碧蓝沧海蛟
一只只从未出现过的御兽被他培育了出来。
。。。。。。
多年后江晨带着一群强大的御兽从饲育基地中走出。
所有御兽师不禁发出惊叹：
“这些御兽都是你培育的？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c6846a739e814746b645e0f8a2f3e875","author":"做个老6","author_id":"","book_id":"7538701398582496280","book_name":"御兽时代：我能看清进化路线！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":74,"name":"宠物","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=74&name=宠物&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":514,"name":"灵气复苏","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=514&name=灵气复苏&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7538736875750572568","read_count":"41982","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"862671"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.1","serial_count":"408","tags":"都市高武,都市,宠物,天才,灵气复苏,都市异能","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/dddde6785a69bcec792f06bf18cf66c2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779397749&x-signature=Pvip9ROZGBbNBg5ZwJcPFMPzukQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3298176085532984","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"33"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032305090873D22F70E5BF4156AF6F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":26,"forwarded_count":0,"liste
